description: Wizard-distributed machine-readable contract for a DERIVED RECORD — the structured result of deriving an operator's foundation-doc input fields from interview answers. A derived record is the field payload (flat key -> value) plus a per-field audit envelope (the `_audit` map). This contract enforces the SHAPE and provenance taxonomy of the envelope, NOT a closed list of field names (the field set grows as new surfaces are added). Two orthogonal envelope axes: a provenance axis (`_source` — where the value came from) and a derivation axis (`_derivation_class` — how the value was produced). Decision-ness (`_decision_field` + `_decision_kind`) is a third, independent axis: a field can be an operator-owned decision without being model-derived. Field values project verbatim into the emission plan's foundation_doc_inputs; the envelope stays in the record and the audit surface, never in the emission plan. The canonical prose specification lives outside the wizard distribution (build-side documentation, not in this artifact).
invariants: DR-1: every payload key (top-level key not in top_level_meta_keys) has an `_audit` envelope entry, and every `_audit` key is a payload key (parity)
DR-2: `_source` in enums.source; `_derivation_class` in enums.derivation_class; `_decision_kind` in enums.decision_kind; `_confirmation_state` (when present) in enums.confirmation_state (fail-closed)
DR-3: `_source == claude-derived-operator-confirmed` requires `_confirmation_state` in {accepted, accepted_with_adjustments, accepted_uncertain_for_now} AND `_confirmed_at` present
DR-4: `_source == operator-preference` must NOT carry `_derivation_inputs` (it may carry `_source_question_ids`)

DR-5: `_derivation_class` in {synthesis, policy} requires non-empty `_derivation_inputs`; `_derivation_class == classification` requires non-empty (`_derivation_inputs` OR `_source_question_ids`); `_derivation_class == authoring` requires non-empty `_source_question_ids` AND must NOT carry `_derivation_inputs` (authored narrative is grounded in the operator's raw answers, not prior payload fields; answer-only at v0)

DR-6: `_derivation_class` in {classification, policy} requires `_decision_field == true` (one-way; operator-preference decisions are also `_decision_field == true`); `_decision_field == true` iff `_decision_kind != none`
DR-7: `_source == ambiguous` requires non-empty `_source_candidates`, all members of enums.source
DR-8: every key cited in `_derivation_inputs` resolves to a payload key; `_source_question_ids` is a non-empty list of strings when present

DR-9: no empty/stub payload content for an `accepted*` field, EXCEPT placeholder-like content allowed when `_label_map_reference` present OR `_intentional_placeholder == true`; TBD-class content allowed only when `_revisit_trigger` present

DR-10: `_confirmation_state == deferred_not_emittable` => the field must NOT project (excluded from foundation_doc_inputs); `_confirmation_state == accepted_uncertain_for_now` => `_revisit_trigger` required; unknown envelope keys must be a known_optional key or match an annotation suffix/prefix, else fail-closed
